name: Cold Gaspacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree all ingredients except scallion in a blender.
2. If the mixture is too spicy, add a little more water to taste.
3. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve, discarding any vegetable pieces that did not puree fully.
4. Chill the soup overnight.
5. Serve chilled in glasses or bowls with diced scallion floating on top.
